query: SELECT campaign_name, COUNT(DISTINCT ad_id) as ad_count, COUNT(DISTINCT content_fingerprint) as fp_count, SUM(CASE WHEN content_fingerprint IS NULL AND creative_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_fp FROM ad_performance GROUP BY campaign_name ORDER BY missing_fp DESC LIMIT 15;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3dMqJsm4KG1E8QU.03f2dd191437 --database UQDffrrvDgfhtLegk7yN6M --execute SELECT campaign_name, COUNT(DISTINCT ad_id) as ad_count, COUNT(DISTINCT content_fingerprint) as fp_count, SUM(CASE WHEN content_fingerprint IS NULL AND creative_id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missing_fp FROM ad_performance GROUP BY campaign_name ORDER BY missing_fp DESC LIMIT 15;
